question: What does this sign mean?
options: Always keep this door open.
Do not park in front of this entrance.
Permission is needed to park here.
Only use this entrance in an emergency.
answer: Do not park in front of this entrance.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu giữ lối vào luôn thông thoáng, không được đậu xe chắn phía trước.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Drinks cannot be ordered at the bar.
Use this machine when the bar is closed.
There is a drinks machine in the bar.
This machine is not working at the moment.
answer: This machine is not working at the moment.
explanation: Biển báo ghi máy bị hỏng, nên hiện tại không thể sử dụng.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: The librarian needs to see your books before you go.
Make sure you take all your books with you.
Return your books before you leave the library.
The librarian will show you where to put your books.
answer: Return your books before you leave the library.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu khi rời thư viện thì phải trả lại toàn bộ sách.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: This room cannot be used at present.
This door must always be kept locked.
Lock the room when it is not being used.
Keep the key to this door in the room.
answer: Lock the room when it is not being used.
explanation: Biển báo ghi rõ hãy khóa cửa khi phòng không được sử dụng.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Supersaver tickets can be used every day except Fridays.
You need a special ticket to travel on a Friday.
Supersaver tickets cannot be bought before the weekend.
You can save money by travelling on a Friday.
answer: Supersaver tickets can be used every day except Fridays.
explanation: Biển báo nói vé Supersaver không dùng được vào thứ Sáu, tức là dùng được các ngày khác.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Do not forget to put your luggage outside your room.
Keep the corridor clear of luggage.
Bags left in the corridor will be removed.
Bags will be collected from the corridor.
answer: Keep the corridor clear of luggage.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu không để túi xách ngoài hành lang, phải giữ hành lang thông thoáng.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Wait upstairs to see the nurse.
Go upstairs to make an appointment with the nurse.
The nurse will tell you when it is your turn.
The nurse can only see patients with appointments.
answer: The nurse can only see patients with appointments.
explanation: Biển báo nói nếu có lịch hẹn với y tá thì hãy dùng phòng chờ ở tầng trên, ngụ ý y tá chỉ tiếp bệnh nhân có hẹn.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Do not touch the fruit before paying for it.
Damaged fruit must be paid for.
Self-service fruit is cheaper.
Choose your fruit and then pay for it.
answer: Choose your fruit and then pay for it.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu khách tự chọn trái cây rồi mang vào trong cửa hàng để thanh toán.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Please be quiet while people are taking their examination.
Do not talk to the examiner.
Do not speak during the examination.
The examiner will tell you when you can talk.
answer: Please be quiet while people are taking their examination.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu giữ yên lặng vì đang có người làm bài thi.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Bring your computer here for repairs.
We will not mend computers bought from other shops.
We charge to repair computers not bought here.
Computers bought here never need repairing.
answer: We will not mend computers bought from other shops.
explanation: Biển báo nói chỉ sửa máy tính mua tại cửa hàng này, không sửa máy từ nơi khác.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: The entrance to the bank is through the library.
The travel agency has moved its entrance.
The library is now a travel agency.
The travel agency is no longer open.
answer: The travel agency has moved its entrance.
explanation: Biển báo thông báo lối vào của công ty du lịch đã được chuyển sang vị trí khác.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: This list shows who has been chosen to go on the trip.
This list should be signed by people wanting to go on the trip.
Check the list for information if you are going on the trip.
If you find your name on this list, you can go on the trip.
answer: This list should be signed by people wanting to go on the trip.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu ai muốn đi chuyến đi thì phải ghi tên vào danh sách.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: The new ticket office is now open.
There will be two ticket offices after 17 September.
This ticket office will be closed for one day.
This ticket office will be closed on 16 September.
answer: This ticket office will be closed on 16 September.
explanation: Biển báo cho biết phòng vé này sẽ đóng cửa vào ngày 16/9 và từ ngày 17/9 sẽ sử dụng phòng vé mới.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: If you spend less than £10, you cannot pay by credit card.
We prefer cash for large sales.
We make a charge if you pay by credit card.
If you spend more than £10, you must pay by credit card.
answer: If you spend less than £10, you cannot pay by credit card.
explanation: Biển báo nói không chấp nhận thanh toán bằng thẻ nếu số tiền dưới 10 bảng.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Dogs must wait outside.
Dogs must walk with their owners.
Dogs must be kept on a chain.
Dogs must be held.
answer: Dogs must be held.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu phải bế chó lên, không được để chó đi tự do.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Everything is cheaper this week.
No extra charges next week.
Usual prices this week.
Cheaper prices next week.
answer: Everything is cheaper this week.
explanation: Biển báo ghi tất cả các mặt hàng đều được giảm giá trong tuần này.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: You can send your groceries from here.
You can store your groceries here.
You can get your free groceries here.
You can have your groceries sent to you.
answer: You can have your groceries sent to you.
explanation: Biển báo cho biết cửa hàng có dịch vụ giao hàng thực phẩm đến tận nhà.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Cleaning now costs twice as much.
Cleaning costs are now cheaper.
Cleaning costs are going up.
Cleaning costs will stay the same.
answer: Cleaning costs are now cheaper.
explanation: Biển báo nói rằng giặt 2 áo khoác với giá của 1, tức là chi phí giặt rẻ hơn.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: You must pay to park here.
If you use the train you can park here.
This place is for railway officials.
No one is allowed to park here
answer: If you use the train you can park here.
explanation: Biển báo cho biết chỉ những người sử dụng nhà ga (đi tàu) mới được phép đậu xe tại đây.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: You can buy your ticket during the journey.
You pay when you get off.
You have to book a seat before travelling.
You have to buy a ticket before your journey.
answer: You have to buy a ticket before your journey.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu hành khách phải mua vé trước khi bắt đầu hành trình (trước khi lên tàu/xe).

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Passengers are allowed to change their seats.
Passengers are allowed to eat snacks on the bus.
Passengers can make noise on the bus.
Passengers have to follow the rules.
answer: Passengers have to follow the rules.
explanation: Biển báo liệt kê các quy định trên xe buýt, yêu cầu hành khách phải tuân theo.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Knock the door if you want to enter when it does not often.
Open the door when you want to enter.
You are not allowed to enter when the door does not open.
You are not allowed to enter if the door is open.
answer: You are not allowed to enter when the door does not open.
explanation: Biển báo cho biết nếu cửa không mở thì không được vào bên trong.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: It's unsafe to go ahead because the area is flooding.
You will be drown if you go around.
You should go ahead if you want to avoid flooding area.
If you can swim, you can go ahead.
answer: It's unsafe to go ahead because the area is flooding.
explanation: Biển báo cảnh báo phía trước đang bị ngập nước, không an toàn để tiếp tục đi nên cần quay đầu lại.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: This is dogs’ play area.
Children can play with dogs in this area.
Dogs are not allowed to enter this area.
People can take their dogs with them in this area.
answer: Dogs are not allowed to enter this area.
explanation: Biển báo ghi rõ 'No dogs allowed', nghĩa là không được mang chó vào khu vực này.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: People must wear long sleeve shirt and trousers in this area.
People must wear casual clothes in this area except long sleeve shirt and trousers.
People have to wear formal clothes in this area except long sleeve shirt and trousers.
Long sleeve shirt and trousers should be worn in this area.
answer: People must wear long sleeve shirt and trousers in this area.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu mọi người phải mặc áo tay dài và quần dài trong khu vực này.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Pay attention to the kids when you are playing.
You have to slow down your speed and be careful when you are driving in this area.
You are not allowed to drive in this area.
Driving is prohibited in this area.
answer: You have to slow down your speed and be careful when you are driving in this area.
explanation: Biển báo 'SLOW – CHILDREN AT PLAY' cảnh báo khu vực có trẻ em, yêu cầu giảm tốc độ và lái xe cẩn thận.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: This area is for smoking only.
This area is for eating only.
This area is for drinking only.
You are not allowed to smoke, eat and drink in this area.
answer: You are not allowed to smoke, eat and drink in this area.
explanation: Biển báo có biểu tượng cấm hút thuốc, ăn và uống, nghĩa là không được thực hiện các hành động này trong khu vực.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Only adults are permitted to drink alcohol on this site.
People under 18 are not allowed to drink alcohol on this site.
No one can drink alcohol on this site.
You are permitted to buy alcohol on this site.
answer: No one can drink alcohol on this site.
explanation: Biển báo có biểu tượng cấm rượu, nghĩa là không ai được phép uống rượu trong khu vực này.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: People will give you a free drive when they see this sign.
Drivers won’t stop when you want to hitchhike here.
You are allowed to hitchhike when you see this sign.
Hitchhiking is accepted here.
answer: Drivers won’t stop when you want to hitchhike here.
explanation: Biển báo 'No hitchhiking' nghĩa là không được xin đi nhờ xe, tài xế sẽ không dừng lại.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Parents and visitors are free to enter the school.
Visitors have to sign in at the office to enter the school.
Parents don’t have to sign in at the office to enter the school.
All parents and visitors have to sign in to receive a pass at the office in order to enter the school.
answer: All parents and visitors have to sign in to receive a pass at the office in order to enter the school.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu tất cả phụ huynh và khách phải đăng ký tại văn phòng và nhận thẻ trước khi vào trường.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Students can use their cell phones outside the school campus.
Students are allowed to use cell phones in the school campus.
Students have to submit their cell phones at the school gate before they enter the school campus.
Parents should keep their children's cell phones before their children enter the school.
answer: Students can use their cell phones outside the school campus.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu học sinh phải tắt điện thoại trước khi vào trường, nên chỉ được dùng điện thoại bên ngoài khuôn viên trường.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: There is no parking left in this area.
This parking zone is used only for buses.
Bus drivers are not allowed to stop here.
This parking zone is used only for loading goods.
answer: This parking zone is used only for buses.
explanation: Biển báo 'No parking bus loading zone' nghĩa là khu vực này chỉ dành cho xe buýt dừng/đỗ.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: It won’t hurt if you are falling down.
This area of work is safe.
You will be in danger of falling if you don’t work at a safe distance and don’t use safety belt.
You don’t need to use a safety belt when you work on this site.
answer: You will be in danger of falling if you don’t work at a safe distance and don’t use safety belt.
explanation: Biển cảnh báo nguy hiểm rơi ngã, yêu cầu giữ khoảng cách an toàn và sử dụng dây an toàn.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Drivers can park in this area after 6 PM on Saturday and Sunday.
Parking time in this area is from 7 AM to 6 PM Monday to Friday.
Drivers are allowed to park their cars in this area before 7 AM and after 6 PM.
Parking is not allowed in this area from 7 AM to 6 PM Monday through Friday.
answer: Parking is not allowed in this area from 7 AM to 6 PM Monday through Friday.
explanation: Biển báo cho biết cấm đỗ xe trong khung giờ 7 giờ sáng đến 6 giờ chiều từ thứ Hai đến thứ Sáu.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Avoid smoking and naked lights because this area is highly flammable.
This is a non-smoker area.
Naked lights aren’t allowed to be used in this area.
Smokers should use naked lights to light their cigarettes in this area.
answer: Avoid smoking and naked lights because this area is highly flammable.
explanation: Biển cảnh báo khu vực dễ cháy, yêu cầu không hút thuốc và không sử dụng lửa trần.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: We cannot deliver papers over the weekend.
We plan to stop delivering papers five days from now.
You must tell us five days early if you don’t want papers.
Please tell us if you don’t want papers at the weekend.
answer: You must tell us five days early if you don’t want papers.
explanation: Biển báo yêu cầu phải thông báo trước 5 ngày nếu bạn không muốn nhận báo.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Accident patients are not admitted here.
The emergency department is closed.
This hospital only accepts accident patients.
Contact this hospital in an emergency.
answer: Accident patients are not admitted here.
explanation: Biển báo nói bệnh viện này không có khoa cấp cứu, nên bệnh nhân cấp cứu hoặc tai nạn sẽ không được tiếp nhận tại đây.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Family tickets save time.
Family tickets save money.
Family tickets may be more expensive.
Family tickets have gone down in price.
answer: Family tickets save money.
explanation: Cụm 'cuts cost' nghĩa là giảm chi phí, tức là vé gia đình giúp tiết kiệm tiền.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: Many people don’t want a motorway.
Building the motorway starts today.
People are going to talk about building a motorway.
Everyone travelling on the motorway should meet here.
answer: People are going to talk about building a motorway.
explanation: Biển báo thông báo có buổi họp công khai để thảo luận về việc xây dựng đường cao tốc.

question: What does this sign mean?
options: You cannot bring your luggage into the dining room.
You must look after your things yourself.
You should give your things to the manager.
You should lock things in your suitcase.
answer: You must look after your things yourself.
explanation: Biển báo nói ban quản lý không chịu trách nhiệm với tài sản để lại trong phòng ăn, nên bạn phải tự giữ đồ của mình.
